description: Baseline: 4-lens prompts on architecture docs. Full pyramid produced. Corpus fidelity weakest dimension — structure feels templated.
Removed 4-lens from decompose+answer. Regression across all dimensions. Questions repetitive (pyramid asked 3x, multi-tenancy 2x). Synthesis weaker without explicit guidance.
Baseline re-scored under v2 rubric. Growth scaffold weakest (no explicit gaps). Concept discovery moderate.

Lens-1 re-scored under v2. Beats baseline on cold-start, concept discovery, growth scaffold. 100 gaps. River-Graph Boundary, Progressive Crystallization discovered. Duplicate L1 questions are horizontal_review bug, not framework quality.

Find tensions framework. 7 L2 branches (vs 4 baseline). Concept discovery strongest (8). Delta chains, intelligence passes, wire agents each got own branch. 162 gaps. Navigable depth still weak (6) — likely horizontal_review depth issue.
Generalizability test: "find tensions" on vibesmithy CODE (not docs). Framework produced corpus-specific L2 branches (spatial canvas, Dennis AI, marble paradigm). Generalizes.
